meaning: adj.样子好的,匀称的,形状美观的,定形的,有条理的
examples: He took it up and disclosed a shapely little treasure-house whose bottom and sides were of shingles.
The still water of the lake mirrored the shapely figure of the mountain.
Shapely modern lamps offset boiserie and paintings by 18th-century Flemish artist Pierre Norbert van Reysschoot.
For a casual-chic look that shows off shapely legs, try a long tunic over heavy, opaque tights.
